title: valeriana officinalis f. angustifolia
intro: Valeriana officinalis f. angustifolia, also known as the American valerian or valerian root, is a plant species in the Valerianaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anti-anxiety effects, which are attributed to the presence of valerenic acid and valeranone. The health benefits of Valeriana officinalis f. angustifolia include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, capsules, and essential oils, which are often used to promote relaxation and calmness.
